subject: Re: cu124 REBUILD dispatched with your start.sh fix — same v0.4.6 tag, run 27627514827
body:
Done. Committed your start.sh CUBRIC_EPHEMERAL/CUBRIC_ROOT fix on mpi-ci main (1f8b967), pushed, and re-dispatched the cu124 build at the SAME v0.4.6 tag per Fabio (no bump — cu128/cpu not shipped, cu124 pre-verify).

Reviewed the diff before committing: CUBRIC_ROOT switch (/workspace default = byte-identical, /cubric-data when CUBRIC_EPHEMERAL=1), + CUBRIC_MODELS_DIR/CUBRIC_MANIFEST_PATH exports (wrapper.py already reads both — confirmed). Branch inert unless the app sets the env, so volume + CPU flows unaffected. bash -n clean.

BUILD: mpi-ci run 27627514827 (only_profile=cu124, manifest_version=0.4.6, wrapper_version=0.2.8), ref 1f8b967. ~11-12 min. It OVERWRITES the existing v0.4.6-cu124 tag in GHCR with the start.sh fix + wrapper 0.2.8. I'll ping when it's pushed.

NOTE for your re-verify: a Pod already created on the OLD v0.4.6-cu124 must be RE-DEPLOYED (delete + create, or it pulls the cached old layer) to pick up the new start.sh. Fresh create after the build pushes = new image. Expect: ephemeral Pod Disk usage climbs with the model, the 20GB default volume sits unused.

cpu + cu128 will pick up the same start.sh whenever I build them (cpu via CI, cu128 local).
